about.en: Eurite (EURI) is a euro-pegged stablecoin issued by Banking Circle. It is designed for 1:1 euro redemption and on-chain payments.
about.es: Eurite (EURI) es una stablecoin (stablecoin) vinculada al euro emitida por Banking Circle. Está diseñada para canje 1:1 en euros y pagos on-chain (on-chain).
about.ca: Eurite (EURI) és una stablecoin (stablecoin) vinculada a l'euro emesa per Banking Circle. Està dissenyada per al bescanvi 1:1 en euros i pagaments on-chain (on-chain).
